parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH
ST_RAW AS (
  SELECT
    DATE                                                              AS date,
    LOWER(QUERY)                                                      AS query,
    CASE WHEN DOM_DOMAIN_ID != 'not set'
         THEN SUBSTR(DOM_DOMAIN_ID, 5, 20)
         ELSE 'not set' END                                           AS domain,
    SUM(SEARCHS)                                                      AS searches,
    SUM(SEARCHSWVIP)                                                  AS searches_vip,
    MAX(RESULTS)                                                      AS max_results,
    SUM(UNIQUEBUYERS_STRICT_24hr)                                     AS buyers,
    SUM(ORDERS_STRICT_24hr)                                           AS orders,
    SUM(TRX_STRICT_24hr)                                              AS trx,
    SUM(GMV_STRICT_24hr)                                              AS gmv,
    SUM(SI_STRICT_24hr)                                               AS si
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_SEARCHTERMS`
  WHERE DATE BETWEEN DATE '2026-05-11' AND DATE '2026-05-18'
    AND SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
    AND PLATFORM IN ('/mobile/android', '/mobile/ios')
    AND LENGTH(LOWER(QUERY)) > 0
    AND LOWER(QUERY) IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
ST_ENRICHED AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date AS STRING)                                              AS date,
    query,
    domain,
    searches,
    searches_vip,
    max_results,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(searches_vip, searches), 4)                     AS ctr,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(buyers, searches), 4)                           AS cvr,
    orders,
    trx,
    ROUND(gmv, 2)                                                     AS gmv,
    si,
    buyers
  FROM ST_RAW
)
SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(
  CONCAT(
    '{"dates":["2026-05-11","2026-05-12","2026-05-13","2026-05-14","2026-05-15","2026-05-16","2026-05-17","2026-05-18"]',
    ',"search_terms":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      date, query, domain, searches, searches_vip, max_results, ctr, cvr, orders, trx, gmv, si, buyers
    ) ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 500))
     FROM ST_ENRICHED),
    ',"refreshed_at":"',
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
    '"}'
  )
AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
